title: Krash TV
short_description: Welcome to Krash TV, the fast-paced arcade action high score racer!
description:
Welcome to Krash TV, the fast-paced arcade action high score racer!

Krash, bash, and smash your way to game show glory. Drive to the top of the TV money pile in this all new kar-azy racer from Rumble Pack Games.

Start your engine and get racing with just one finger or thumb to control your car.
